notes: Web-services-based IT infrastructure centered on business processes and services; displaced by microservices/REST APIs/cloud-native architectures
XML-based RPC/messaging protocol; WS-* stack; displaced by REST/JSON and later GraphQL/gRPC
Applications assembled from services drawn across multiple IT sources via web services standards; intermediate step between monolithic apps and full SOA
Portal servers (IBM WebSphere Portal, SAP NetWeaver Portal, Microsoft SharePoint, Oracle WebCenter) as single-pane-of-glass enterprise UX; largely displaced by SaaS UIs and modern intranet platforms
